data.title: PiShield: UXLINK attackers exchanged 5,496 ETH for approximately 11 million DAI.
data.description: According to PyShield monitoring, the attackers at UXLINK have exchanged 5,496 ETH for approximately 11 million DAI. Previously, on September 22, 2025, UXLINK suffered a hacker attack due to a compromised multisignature wallet, resulting in losses exceeding $44 million.

data.title: Prediction market platform Myriad completes seed round funding, with Tom Lee and others participating.
data.description: Prediction market platform Myriad announced the completion of its seed round of financing, with the specific amount undisclosed. Investors in this round included MoonPay Ventures, Auros, EVG, Verda Ventures, Side Door Ventures, Wave Financial, Walrus, and OFR, while individual investors included Fundstrat co-founder Tom Lee, NFT collector Blondish, and Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz. This financing news follows the launch of Myriad Season 3. In Season 3, the platform migrated its event contracts to the BNB Chain. Simultaneously, the platform's liquidity model was upgraded from an automated market maker to a central limit order book, adding features such as slippage control, limit orders, and dynamic fees. (Decrypt)

data.title: Polymarket Faces Technical Issues Affecting Trading Operations
data.description: Polymarket is currently experiencing technical difficulties, according to its official interface. The platform has reported that some sections may be experiencing downtime. According to NS3.AI, the discrepancies between order book displays and actual market conditions are causing delays that could impact trades, prices, positions, and balances. Users are advised to exercise caution while the issues are being addressed.

data.title: China Maintains Loan Prime Rates Unchanged for 10th Consecutive Month
data.description: China has decided to keep its one-year Loan Prime Rate (LPR) steady at 3.0%, marking the 10th consecutive month without a change in its benchmark lending rates. According to NS3.AI, the People's Bank of China also maintained the five-year LPR at 3.5%. The one-year rate is primarily used as a guide for most corporate and household loans, whereas the five-year rate serves as a reference for mortgages.

data.title: UAE Defense Ministry: Air Defense Systems Countering Iranian Missile and Drone Threats
data.description: The United Arab Emirates (UAE) Defense Ministry has announced that its air defense systems are actively responding to missile and drone threats originating from Iran. According to Jin10, the ministry confirmed that the sounds heard were the result of the air defense systems intercepting missiles and drones.

data.title: Brazil's President Lula Blames Bolsonaro for Banco Master Collapse
data.description: Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva has attributed the collapse of Banco Master to his predecessor, Jair Bolsonaro, during a campaign event. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the political tensions that have intensified as a result of this accusation. Lula's remarks come amid ongoing scrutiny of the financial institution's downfall, which has become a focal point in the country's political discourse. The situation underscores the deepening divide between the current administration and the previous government, as both sides continue to exchange blame over economic challenges.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | New York Gold Futures Surpass $4,700 per Ounce Amid Daily Increase
data.description: New York gold futures have surged past the $4,700 per ounce mark, experiencing a daily increase of 2.05%. According to Jin10, this rise in gold prices reflects heightened market activity and investor interest in precious metals. The upward movement comes amid broader economic uncertainties, prompting investors to seek safe-haven assets. Analysts suggest that ongoing geopolitical tensions and fluctuating economic indicators may continue to influence gold's trajectory in the near term.

data.title: Senate Republicans are considering adding deregulation provisions for banks to the crypto market structure bill.
data.description: According to Politico, Senate Republicans are considering adding bank deregulation provisions to the crypto market structure bill to help advance a stalled housing program.

data.title: Spot silver extended its gains to 2.00% on the day, currently trading at $74.28 per ounce.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot silver rose 2.00% intraday, currently trading at $74.28 per ounce.

data.title: Polymarket's partial sector forecasts suggest a possible outage.
data.description: According to the official interface, some sectors of Polymarket are expected to experience outages, and the order book display does not match the actual situation. There may be delays in transactions, prices, positions, and balances. Please trade with caution.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Silver Increases Over 1% Intraday
data.description: Spot silver experienced an intraday increase of more than 1%, reaching a price of $73.55 per ounce. According to NS3.AI, this rise in silver prices reflects ongoing market dynamics and investor interest in precious metals.

data.title: Iran's Parliament: No Plans for U.S. Talks, Iranian Media Reports
data.description: Iran's Parliament spokesperson for the National Security and Foreign Policy Committee, Ebrahim Rezaei, stated that Iran currently has no plans to engage in negotiations with the United States, according to Iranian media reports on March 20. Rezaei dismissed claims of ceasefire or negotiations as false information spread by the U.S. to control energy prices. According to Jin10, he emphasized that the security situation on Iran's Kharg Island remains stable, and Iranian oil exports continue uninterrupted. Rezaei highlighted that Iran's recent actions have achieved significant results, delivering a more decisive blow to its adversaries. He warned that any country allowing Iran's adversaries to use its territory or military bases would be considered a direct participant in the conflict and a target for Iran's retaliation.

data.title: STOCKS | Hong Kong's Hang Seng Index and Tech Index Turn Positive, Li Ning Surges Over 12.5%
data.description: Hong Kong's Hang Seng Index and Hang Seng Tech Index experienced an early rise, both turning positive. According to Jin10, Li Ning (02331.HK) saw a significant increase of over 12.5%. Horizon Robotics (09660.HK) rose by more than 6.5%, Geely Automobile (00175.HK) climbed over 4%, and CATL (03750.HK) increased by more than 3.8%.

data.title: Yotta Plans IPO with $4 Billion Valuation Target
data.description: Yotta, a leading data center operator in India, is aiming to raise new capital with a valuation of approximately $4 billion. Bloomberg posted on X that the company is preparing to file its draft prospectus for an initial public offering (IPO). Yotta operates the largest cluster of Nvidia AI processors in India, positioning itself as a significant player in the data center industry. The move to go public comes as the demand for AI and data processing capabilities continues to grow globally. The company’s strategic expansion and investment in advanced technology infrastructure are expected to attract substantial investor interest.

data.title: A whale established a $183 million long position in BTC with a "10-point target" in mind, and is currently showing a floating profit of $1.113 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale, "Setting 10 Big Targets First," established a $183 million long position in BTC, currently showing a floating profit of $1.113 million. @Jason60704294 has completed a long position of 2601.5 BTC, with a total position value of $183 million. The opening price for this trade was $70,016.98, the liquidation price was $57,855, and the current floating profit is $1.113 million.

data.title: Bedrock: uniBTC holders can obtain fixed spreads from institutional underwriting through Cap.
data.description: Bedrock stated in an article on the X platform that by leveraging Cap's credit engine, uniBTC holders can now obtain a fixed spread from institutional underwriting. This scheme expands the utility of BTC by utilizing the credit of on-chain financial institutions to provide sustainable returns.

data.title: Intuition founder billΞ.eth lost $703,000 selling 5,571 ETH.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Intuition founder billΞ.eth (0xbilly) sold 5571 ETH in the past 10 hours at an average price of $2113.77, incurring a loss of $703,000. This same address had previously purchased 7768.56 ETH on-chain at an average price of $2240.1 on March 16th, worth $17.4 million. The remaining ETH at this address has now been deposited into EtherFi.

data.title: HYPE whale tummy.hl sold 498,000 HYPE tokens via TWAP order, worth over $20 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the wallet (0x97bf...ef74) associated with HYPE genesis whale tummy.hl (@tummyy1) is selling 498,000 HYPE tokens via TWAP order, worth over $20 million. The transaction is expected to be completed within the next 21 hours.

data.title: Hong Kong Attracts Record Number of Overseas and Mainland Enterprises
data.description:
Hong Kong's InvestHK assisted 560 overseas and mainland enterprises in establishing operations in the city last year, marking a more than 4% increase from the previous year and setting a new record. According to RTHK, these enterprises brought nearly HKD 70 billion in investments and created over 10,000 new jobs. InvestHK Assistant Director Lau Chi-yuen highlighted in an interview that the record number of companies reflects Hong Kong's attractive business environment and global investors' confidence in the city's prospects.

Lau noted that the newly established outbound task force, with its cross-bureau, cross-departmental resources and proactive approach, has been instrumental in attracting mainland enterprises to Hong Kong, especially after the U.S. introduced reciprocal tariffs last year. Mainland companies have increased their supply chain projects overseas, viewing Hong Kong as an ideal testing ground.

The government is accelerating the development of the Northern Metropolis, and Lau mentioned that potential mainland enterprises have shown significant interest in the area's development model. He believes the Northern Metropolis will become a key attraction for mainland companies considering establishing a presence in Hong Kong. InvestHK is intensifying its promotion of the Northern Metropolis, particularly its incentive packages, which include land grants, tax benefits, talent acquisition, and industry incentives, to attract more mainland enterprises to the city.
